title: Then Kudicha Nilavu Song Lyrics Naan Avan Illai
stanzas:
Then Kudicha Nilavu Song Lyrics Naan Avan Illai
#VijayAntony #NareshIyer

Then kudicha nilavu
vizhi mayangum iravidhu
thinamthorum thiruvonamthaan

kai pudicha uravu
kadhai ezhudhum azhagidhu
thirichooru thirukolamthan

kili irandu
inaiyum podhu kili
pattallae.
siragadikkum
vizhiyinnodu kuyil
paattallae.

mayil kazhuthu
valayum podhu
mazhai paattallae.
mazhai thuligal
vazhiyum podhu
uyir pattallae.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Then Kudicha Nilavu expresses themes of love and nostalgia, reflecting on beautiful memories shared between lovers.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Naan Avan Illai, this song plays during a romantic moment, highlighting the deep connection between the characters.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song features the talented voices of Deepa Mariyam and Naresh Iyer, with music composed by Vijay Antony.

When was the song released?

Then Kudicha Nilavu was released on April 20, 2007.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Then Kudicha Nilavu, the lyrical beauty unfolds as the singers express deep emotions of love and longing. The song serves as a backdrop to pivotal romantic moments in Naan Avan Illai, enhancing the narrative with its soothing melody. It evokes feelings of nostalgia, making listeners reminisce about their own cherished memories. The collaboration of Deepa Mariyam and Naresh Iyer, alongside Vijay Antony's music, creates a captivating experience that resonates with the heart.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Then Kudicha Nilavu from Naan Avan Illai is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of romance and nostalgia. With the enchanting voices of Deepa Mariyam and Naresh Iyer, paired with Vijay Antony's captivating music, this song is a perfect blend of melody and emotion. Dive into the lyrical beauty that evokes heartfelt memories and timeless love.
stanzaMeanings: The moon that shines like honey makes the eyes lose their way, every day is a festival.
The bond held by hands writes a beautiful story, it is a divine form of art.
When two birds meet, they don't sing. The cuckoo doesn't sing with the eyes that can fly.
When the peacock dances, it doesn't sing in the rain. When the raindrops fall, life doesn't sing.
The moon that shines like honey makes the eyes lose their way, every day is a festival.
The bond held by hands writes a beautiful story, it is a divine form of art.
In the tangled hair, the heart is wrapped around you, wrapped around you, wrapped around you, wrapped around you, wrapped around you.
In the tangled hair, in the sweet fragrance, life is lost, lost, lost.
In the paths of life, in the moments of time, I will hold you a little, you will hold me a little, the youthful thoughts will do something, will do something, will do something, will do something.
The moon that shines like honey makes the eyes lose their way, every day is a festival.
The bond held by hands writes a beautiful story, it is a divine form of art.
When two birds meet, they don't sing. The cuckoo doesn't sing with the eyes that can fly.
When the peacock dances, it doesn't sing in the rain. When the raindrops fall, life doesn't sing.
In the banana leaves, the gentle rain drops sing poetry, in the sweet journey, in the journey, in the journey, in the journey.
In the beautiful eyes, the fragrant sandalwood, the red kumkum, the flowers bloom, bloom, bloom, bloom.
The moon that shines like honey makes the eyes lose their way, every day is a festival.
The bond held by hands writes a beautiful story, it is a divine form of art.
When two birds meet, they don't sing. The cuckoo doesn't sing with the eyes that can fly.
When the peacock dances, it doesn't sing in the rain. When the raindrops fall, life doesn't sing.
